# Transcrição: 10. Poor Previous Decisions

- **Fonte:** 10. Poor Previous Decisions
- **Duração:** 01:25

## [00:00 - 01:25]

Poor previous decisions. Listen to this. These people have made so many bad decisions in the past they can't make one with you. It's like the girl that was in a bad relationship. Now she doesn't want another boyfriend. Poor previous decisions causes the client you're following up on to not want to make a decision that's even good for them. You need to call them out on this. Just sit down with them on a personal visit, not text, not email, not phone calls. Sit down, maybe when you delivered some cookies or some gimmick or free offer or a lottery ticket or something and just ask. Yeah, she, have you had, is the company made poor decisions in the past? Poor previous decisions in the past? Have you made some decisions that didn't work out? However you want to phrase that and then you're gonna find out, yeah, we bought this and we bought this and we bought this and I promise you just get them to talk about how those previous decisions were bad for them. That whole situation will disappear for them and they'll be able to make another decision. A new one with you, there's probably not gonna be a bad decision but you got to differentiate. Nobody's ever asked in this about previous poor decisions. Do it with the girlfriend or do it with business and I promise you it's gonna flush out the fact that you just, you're following up a client that can't make a decision with you because they can't differentiate between previous poor decisions.
